title: NIT Hamirpur Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 07 Project Assistant and Project Associate Posts
description: The National Institute of Technology Hamirpur (NIT Hamirpur) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 07 Project Assistant and Project Associate Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma, B.E./B. Tech in Civil Engineering can apply for the NIT Hamirpur Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned t...
